## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## App lane

- [ ] Web

## Problem it solves

What would improve with this feature?

## Proposed solution

How should it work?

## Privacy and safety impact

Describe any user-facing copy, diagnostics, account, playback, or support-report impact.

## Alternatives considered

List any other ideas you thought about.

## Notes

Add screenshots, examples, or references here.
